title: Introduction
content: # StackNStay Knowledge Base

title: What is StackNStay?
content: StackNStay is an AI-powered property rental platform that connects property owners (hosts) with travelers (guests) seamlessly.

title: Key Features:
content:
- **Low Fees**: We offer highly competitive platform fees compared to traditional competitors.
- **Secure Escrow**: Your payment is held securely in our system until after you check-in.
- **AI-Powered**: Smart chat agents help you find the perfect property or answer any questions you have.
- **Direct Connection**: Connect directly with hosts for your inquiries.

---

title: Why So Low?
content:
Traditional platforms charge 15-20% in fees. StackNStay leverages AI automations to handle customer service and booking logistics, keeping overhead drastically lower.

**Fee Breakdown:**
- **Guest Fee**: 2% of booking total
- **Host Fee**: 0% (hosts keep 100% of their listed price!)
- **Traditional Platforms**: 15-20% total fees

---

title: Step-by-Step Process:
content:
1. **Browse Properties**: Ask our AI assistant to find properties by location, price, or amenities.
2. **Select Dates**: Choose check-in and check-out dates.
3. **Book & Pay**: Payment goes into our secure escrow system.
4. **Confirmation**: Booking is confirmed immediately.
5. **Check-in**: At check-in time, payment releases to the host.
6. **Check-out**: Leave a review to help future guests!

title: Escrow Protection:
content:
Your payment is held safely until check-in. This protects both guests and hosts:

**For Guests:**
- Money held safely until check-in
- Can cancel for refund depending on the cancellation policy
- Dispute resolution if property doesn't match listing

**For Hosts:**
- Guaranteed payment after check-in
- Protected from fraudulent chargebacks
- Automatic payment release

---

title: Refund Schedule:
content:
**More than 7 days before check-in:**
- 100% refund (minus a small processing fee)

**3-7 days before check-in:**
- 50% refund

**Less than 3 days before check-in:**
- 0% refund (host keeps full amount)

**After check-in:**
- No refunds (payment already released to host)

title: How to Cancel:
content:
1. Go to your "My Bookings" page
2. Find your booking
3. Click "Cancel Booking"
4. Automated refunds are processed instantly to your payment method

---

title: When to Raise a Dispute:
content:
- Property doesn't match listing
- Serious cleanliness issues
- Safety concerns
- Host no-show or locked out
- Major amenities missing

title: How Disputes Work:
content:
1. **Guest raises dispute** (during stay or within 24 hours of check-out)
2. **Evidence submitted**: Photos, messages, descriptions
3. **Admin reviews**: Platform support team examines evidence
4. **Decision made**: Full refund, partial refund, or no refund
5. **Resolution**: Refund processed automatically if approved

---

title: For Guests:
content:
1. **Create an Account**: Sign up directly via the StackNStay portal.
2. **Add Payment Method**: Securely add a credit or debit card.
3. **Start Booking**: Chat with our AI or browse the listings to find the perfect stay!

title: For Hosts:
content:
1. **Create an Account**: Register as a host.
2. **Create Listing**:
   - Click "List Property"
   - Upload high-quality photos
   - Set price 
   - Add amenities and description
3. **Publish**: Your listing will go live immediately.
4. **Manage Bookings**:
   - View bookings in your dashboard
   - Payments sent out after check-in
   - Respond to guest messages

---

title: "Host isn't responding"
content:
**Solution:**
- Hosts have 24 hours to respond to inquiries.
- If no response and more than 7 days before check-in: Cancel for a full refund.
- If less than 7 days: Contact StackNStay support for assistance.

title: "Property doesn't match listing"
content:
**Solution:**
- Take photos immediately.
- Raise a dispute within 24 hours of check-out.
- Provide evidence (photos, descriptions).
- Support will review and determine a fair refund.

---

title: FAQ
content:
**Q: Is my data private?**  
A: Yes! We stringently protect user data and do not sell your personal information to third parties.

**Q: What happens if the host cancels?**  
A: You get a full refund automatically.

**Q: Can I list multiple properties?**  
A: Yes! There is no limit on listings under a single host account.

**Q: How do I become a host?**  
A: Sign up and click "List Property". It's that simple!

title: Introduction
content: # Aether Guest Guide

title: How to Book
content:
1. **Discover**: Ask our AI assistant to find properties matching your requirements (e.g., "Find me a 2-bedroom apartment in Paris under $100").
2. **Select Dates**: Pick your check-in and check-out dates.
3. **Pay Securely**: Your payment is securely escrowed until check-in time.

title: Escrow Protection
content: Your money is not immediately given to the host. It is held securely in escrow. At check-in time, the payment is automatically released. This protects you from fraudulent listings.

title: Cancellation Policy
content:
- **More than 7 days before check-in**: 100% refund.
- **3-7 days before**: 50% refund.
- **Less than 3 days**: 0% refund.

title: Troubleshooting
content: If a host is unresponsive, wait 24 hours. If it's less than 7 days before your trip, please raise a support ticket and Aether support will intervene or refund you.

title: Introduction
content: # Aether FAQ

title: What is Aether?
content: Aether is an AI-powered property rental platform that connects property owners (hosts) with travelers (guests). We use advanced AI to assist in discovery, booking, and support, providing a seamless experience.

title: What are the costs?
content: Unlike traditional platforms that charge 15-20% in fees, Aether charges a flat 2% fee to guests, and 0% to hosts. This lets hosts keep 100% of their earnings while guests save significantly on booking costs.

title: Is my data secure?
content: Yes. Aether employs strict data privacy policies. We do not sell user data. Our AI models are private and do not train on your personal data.

title: I have a dispute. What do I do?
content: Disputes can be raised within 24 hours of checking out. You just need to submit photos and a description of the issue to our support team. The team will review the claim and issue an appropriate refund automatically via our secure escrow system.
section: I have a dispute. What do I do?

title: Introduction
content: # Aether Host Guide

title: Why Host on Aether?
content:
1. **0% Host Fees**: You keep 100% of your listed price. We don't take a cut of your earnings.
2. **AI Support**: Our AI assistant helps answer common guest questions about your property, saving you time.
3. **Secure Escrow**: You are guaranteed payment upon the guest's check-in via our automated escrow system, protecting you from chargebacks.

title: How to List Your Property
content:
1. Create an account.
2. Click "List Property".
3. Provide high-quality photos, write a detailed description, list your amenities, and set your nightly price.
4. Publish your listing, which instantly goes live on the platform!

title: Receiving Payments
content: Payments are securely held when the guest books and instantly released to your payout method on the day of check-in.

title: Managing Bookings
content: You can manage all your reservations from the Dashboard. You have up to 24 hours to respond to guest inquiries before they are permitted to cancel for a full refund.
